package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for patch_dto_uses_non_pointer_fields_for_optional_updates: PATCH-like DTOs that cannot distinguish omitted fields from zero values.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule111NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule111NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule111NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario111Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule111NegativeService, input Rule111NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
